_comment: Deployment recommendation from fine_pass_discussion.md §15. Marginal-best region: GATED + MEAN + hidden_dim=64 (the median-best capacity, NOT BO winner's 128) + num_layers=4 (TPE's modal winner) + RELU (most common in top-N trials at the higher N thresholds) + dropout=0.1 (conservative midpoint of the flat [0, 0.25] band) + batch_size=16 + LR=1e-3 + Adam + weight_decay=1e-5. To be evaluated head-to-head against the BO winner on the SAME 5 split seeds (split_seed_start=1001) so the comparison is paired.
